title: Fix up handling of image data as well as setting Linux Capabilties correctly

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@mheon @baude @jwhonce This will fix a bunch of failures, since we are not getting data out of the images.  Also should fix test/e2e/run_security_labels.go tests.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5548) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@baude @mheon @jwhonce @TomSweeneyRedHat @QiWang19 @giuseppe Lets get this in so we can pass more tests.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5879) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
